products.name: PA-RR-260-8
products.descriptor: Small redundant electromechanical servo actuator for safety-critical UAV systems

evidence.snippet:
### PA-RR-260-8 Redundant Actuators
](/product/redundant-actuator/pa-rr-260-8.html)
[](/product/redundant-actuator/pa-rr-260-8.html)
The Pegasus PA-RR-260-8 is the world’s first small redundant servo-actuator for safety-critical unmanned systems, enhancing servo-actuator reliability to an unparalleled level.

products.name: PA-R-205-5
products.descriptor: BLDC industrial servo actuator rated for operation up to 60,000 ft altitude

evidence.snippet:
PA-R-205-5
Industrial Actuators
=================================
The PA-R-205-5 Actuator line is the BLDC version of our PA-R-205-4 and PA-R-205-6 series.
We designed and manufactured this actuator for applications that can operate at altitudes up to 60,000 feet.

products.name: PA-R-250-8-OPV
products.descriptor: BLDC OPV servo actuator with electromagnetic clutch, 500 Ncm max torque

evidence.snippet:
### PA-R-250-8-OPV Actuators
](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-8-opv.html)
[](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-8-opv.html)
The Pegasus PA-R-250-8 OPV-servo is the right actuator for applications with high demands on powerful torque and high-speed positioning. With its BLDC - technology (brushless DC motor) and PA-ME contact-less sensor it combines extraordinary reliability and precision.
In conjunction with our PA-RA-3 electromagnetic OPV clutch-assembly this makes a perfect OPV-servo.

products.name: PA-R-250-9-OPV
products.descriptor: High-power OPV servo actuator with PA-RA-3 electromagnetic clutch, 700 Ncm max torque

evidence.snippet:
](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-9-opv.html)
[](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-9-opv.html)
The PA-R-250-9-OPV-servo is the high-power version of the well proven PA-R-250-8-OPV-servo-actuator. We implemented a high-output-brushless DC motor and adjusted the gear-train as well as the servo case design. Its power-to-weight ratio is second to none.
In conjunction with our PA-RA-3 electromagnetic OPV clutch-assembly this makes a perfect OPV-servo.
Characteristics:

products.name: PA-RR-720-7-OPV
products.descriptor: High-torque redundant OPV servo actuator with electromagnetic clutch, 35 Nm max torque

evidence.snippet:
### PA-RR-720-7-OPV Actuators
](/product/opv-actuator/pa-rr-720-7-opv.html)
[](/product/opv-actuator/pa-rr-720-7-opv.html)
The Pegasus PA-RR-720-7 redundant servo-actuator is based on the main components of our well proven PA-RR-340-9 redundant servo-actuator. With its improved gear train bearings and servo case plus a modified hard- and software it can reach up to 35 Nm of sheer torque.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance claims found anywhere in the corpus — all 15 products remain unknown on both dimensions.

Dedicated product pages for the five non-OPV PA-RR models (PA-RR-260-8/9, PA-RR-340-7/9, PA-RR-720-7) were skipped due to class-budget exhaustion; product data was sourced from the products overview page (resource-0002) which contains full specs.
